summary:
- **No actual lint fixes present**: The PR title claims to 'Fix 6 ruff lint violation(s) (F401, F841, F541)' but the diff contains zero Python code changes. The only files added are automation artifacts (`kodo-run-capture.json` and `kodo-stdout.log`) under `.operations_center/backend_details/`.
- **All 6 violations confirmed still present**: Ran `ruff check` on the PR branch — all 6 violations remain: unused import `uuid` (F401), unused variables `title`, `parent_kind`, `result` (F841×3), f-string without placeholders (F541), multiple imports on one line (E401) in `src/operations_center/entrypoints/board_worker/main.py` and `tests/test_pr_review_watcher.py`.
- **Failed automation run**: The kodo stdout log shows the run failed due to API quota exhaustion ('You're out of extra usage'). All 3 cycles errored out immediately with zero exchanges and no work performed.
- **Misleading commit message**: The commit message 'Fix 6 ruff lint violation(s)' is inaccurate — no violations were fixed.
- **Recommendation**: Close this PR and re-attempt the fixes. The 6 violations are straightforward (3 are auto-fixable via `ruff check --fix`).
